title: Welcome+
description: Quick Chat And Fully Customizable Command Buttons Positioned Directly Above Your Chat Bar.
body:
# **Welcome+** 
is a lightweight quality-of-life client mod that adds customizable quick-chat buttons directly to the Minecraft chat bar. Including 20 optional/configurable command buttons! Instead of typing out common greetings or commands every time, just click a button!

Perfect for multiplayer servers where **fast** communication matters.

![Hovering over the Welcome button.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79032134390351336b199d629ae1fcbca4ed7300_0.webp)

## **Features**

•🖱️ **Chat Bar Buttons** – Adds clickable buttons directly to your chat screen.

•👋 **Welcome Button** – Sends your configured Welcome message to new players.

•🍀 **Good Luck Button (GL)** – Quickly wish teammates Good Luck.

•🔄 **Welcome Back Button (WB)** – Greet returning friends with a single click.

•🎭 **Custom Command Buttons** – Up to 20 configurable mini-buttons (10 left, 10 right) for personal commands.

•🎨 **Configurable Colors & Labels** – Each custom button can have its own symbol, text color, and tooltip.

•🖼️ **Hover Tooltips** – Preview what each button will send before clicking.

•🔧 **Config Menu Integration** – Works with Cloth Config + Mod Menu for in-game configuration.

•✅ **Lightweight & Client-Only** – No server installation required.
